title: Universal Tool Texturising Hammer Dual Face Square Stripe Patterns Wooden Handle
description:
Create beautifully textured jewelry with the Dual Head Texturizing Hammer! This hammer features two different textured heads - rounded stripes on one side and square dimples on the other. Overall the hammer is 10.25" in length and the face diameters are 1.125". The wooden handle has a comfortably molded grip and the head is constructed of high quality steel. Make sure to grab this textured hammer before your next jewelry making or metalworking project!
